cause_analysis.narrative: Skincare with Maria churned on 2026-04-16 after 68 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-26 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "disappointing". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 111 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
